comment: Nx-style manifest. Each entry pairs a codemod with the acture version at which it was first published. Mirrors the in-code MANIFEST in src/manifest.ts.

codemods.name: wrap-handler-with-mutation
codemods.description: Wrap onClick/onChange/onSubmit handler expressions with wrapMutation().

codemods.name: extract-onclick-to-command
codemods.description: Lift inline arrow handlers into module-level defineCommand calls.
